title: S + keep/leave + O + V-ing/adj.（保持狀態）

formulas.zh: 讓某人或物保持（某狀態）；也可表示持續做某事
持續進行某動作，不間斷地做某事

explanation: 此句型用於表達保持狀態或持續動作。keep/leave後接受詞（名詞或代詞），再加現在分詞或形容詞，表讓某人或物維持特定狀態。如「keep the door open」。當keep單獨後接V-ing時，表示持續或反覆進行某動作，無受詞。易混淆處：形容詞與現在分詞的選擇需依狀態或動作性質判斷；「leave O adj.」強調靜態狀態。

examples.eng: Please keep the windows open during the day to let fresh air in.
examples.chi: 請在白天保持窗戶開著以讓新鮮空氣進入。

examples.eng: The teacher left the classroom empty after the final exam ended.
examples.chi: 期末考結束後，老師讓教室保持空著。

examples.eng: He kept calling his friend until someone finally answered the phone.
examples.chi: 他持續打電話給他的朋友直到有人終於接聽。

examples.eng: Don't keep the light on when you leave the office at night.
examples.chi: 你晚上離開辦公室時不要讓燈保持開著。

adj_table_for.zh: 等待中的（現在分詞作形容詞）
運行中的（現在分詞作形容詞）
上鎖的（過去分詞作形容詞）

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：若表「靜態狀況」用形容詞（如open, closed, clean）；若表「動態進行」用現在分詞（如calling, working, playing）。keep V-ing不需受詞，表持續反覆；keep O adj./V-ing則需受詞。注意leave O adj.強調狀態留下。

examples.test: Keep the door _____ (open/opening) for the guests.
examples.result: → Keep the door open（形容詞，保持開啟狀態）

examples.test: He kept _____ (talk/talking) about the same topic.
examples.result: → He kept talking（V-ing，持續進行的動作）

examples.test: Don't leave the children _____ (alone/aloning) in the house.
examples.result: → Don't leave the children alone（形容詞，靜態狀態）

extension.note: 形容詞→靜態狀態；V-ing→動態進行；keep O adj./V-ing有受詞，keep V-ing無受詞。

exercises.sentence: You should keep your room clean and organized.
exercises.translation: 你應該保持你的房間乾淨且有序。

parts: in the crib while she prepared dinner.
exercises.sentence: The mother left her baby sleeping in the crib while she prepared dinner.
exercises.translation: 媽媽在準備晚餐時讓她的嬰兒在嬰兒床裡睡著。

parts: trying hard, you will eventually succeed in this project.
exercises.sentence: If you keep trying hard, you will eventually succeed in this project.
exercises.translation: 如果你持續努力，你最終會在這個專案中成功。

parts: to prevent the rain from coming in.
exercises.sentence: Please keep the windows closed to prevent the rain from coming in.
exercises.translation: 請保持窗戶關閉以防止雨水進來。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的詞彙完成句子，表示保持門開著的狀態。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Please keep the door _______ so the fresh air can come in.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (open)。keep + O + adj. 表示保持某物處於特定靜態狀態，open 是形容詞。A (opening) 是現在分詞，但此處表狀態而非動作；C (opens) 是動詞第三人稱，用法錯誤；D (to open) 是不定詞，不符合此句型結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確詞彙，表示老師使教室保持安靜的狀態。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher kept the classroom _______ during the exam so students could concentrate.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (silent)。keep + O + adj. 表示保持靜態狀態，silent 為形容詞。B (silencing) 是現在分詞，強調動作進行中而非狀態保持；C (being silent) 語法冗余；D (to open) 不符合句型結構。此句型著重於狀態維持，需用形容詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確選項，區別 keep 和 leave 搭配動詞或形容詞的用法差異。
mc_exercises.question_eng: He left the window _______ all night, but I kept the lights _______ to save electricity.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (open; off)。leave/keep + O + adj. 都表示保持靜態狀態。open 和 off 都是形容詞，描述窗戶和燈的狀態。B 用現在分詞強調動作而非狀態；C 用過去分詞表被動而非狀態保持；D 用不定詞結構錯誤。此句型強調保持狀態，應使用形容詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 區別 keep + V-ing（持續動作）和 keep + O + adj.（保持狀態）的用法。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Mary _______ complaining about the noise, so I decided to leave her alone. Meanwhile, I kept my bedroom door _______ to block the sound.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (kept; closed)。第一空為過去式 kept + V-ing，表示瑪麗持續反覆抱怨。第二空為 keep + O + adj.，kept my door closed 表保持房門處於關閉狀態。A 的 closing 誤用為狀態；B 時態不符（當前文用過去式）；D 混淆兩種用法，第二空應用形容詞，不能用現在分詞。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 媽媽叫我保持房間整潔。
translation_exercises.answer: My mother asks me to keep my room clean.
hints: 句型框架：keep + O + 形容詞，表保持某物處於特定狀態
注意：clean 是形容詞，不是動詞；若要用動詞應改為 cleaning（現在分詞）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師要求學生在考試期間保持安靜。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher requires students to keep quiet during the exam.
hints: 句型框架：keep + O + 形容詞，此處 quiet 形容詞修飾 students 的狀態
常見錯誤：誤用 keeping quiet 或 be quiet，應用 keep + adj. 結構

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 不要讓食物放在外面太久而變壞。
translation_exercises.answer: Don't leave the food sitting out for too long.
key_points: sitting out（放在外面，現在分詞表動作）
hints: 句型框架：leave + O + V-ing，表讓某物處於持續的動作狀態；leave 強調「放任不管」
注意：sitting out 是現在分詞短語，描述食物被放在外面的狀態

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他整天持續玩手機，這讓他的視力保持惡化的狀態。
translation_exercises.answer: He keeps playing with his phone all day, which leaves his eyesight getting worse.
key_points: keep + V-ing（無受詞，表持續反覆）
eyesight getting worse（視力惡化的現在分詞片語）
hints: 句型框架有兩種：keep playing（持續玩）是 keep + V-ing；leave his eyesight getting worse 是 leave + O + V-ing
易混淆：keep + V-ing 無受詞表反覆動作；keep + O + V-ing/adj. 有受詞表保持狀態；leave + O + V-ing 強調放任導致的消極狀態
